title: Plasmo Voice Retextured
description: A simple rework of the Plasmo Voice icons
body:
This is a resource pack for the [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) mod that mimics discord's icons.

**Works with 2.x.x versions only.**

Inspired by [Outlined Plasmo Voice Icons resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/outlined-plasmo-voice-icons)
